description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular, and weathered metal head with a rough, dark gray surface, showing signs of rust and wear. The head is mounted on a thick, wooden handle that is gnarled and twisted, with branch-like protrusions spiraling around it, giving it a rugged, almost organic appearance. At the center of the handle, just below the head, is a prominent green, glassy orb embedded within the wood, adding a mystical or decorative element. The handle appears sturdy and is textured with knots and bark-like details, enhancing grip and visual interest. The overall design is unconventional, blending utilitarian function with fantasy-inspired aesthetics. This hammer would stand out in an urban environment due to its unique, almost magical look.
description: A rugged hammer with a weathered metal head, twisted wooden handle, and a green orb embedded below the head, featuring branch-like protrusions.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat face of the metal head, the twisted wooden handle, and the green orb prominently centered below the head.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the metal head and the spiraling, branch-like protrusions along the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the metal head, the green orb, and the organic, twisted structure of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the depth of the head and the irregular, gnarled texture of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: twisted wooden handle with branch-like protrusions, textured and gnarled for enhanced grip
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type metal head with a flat striking face, weathered and rusted
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: visible rust, scratches, and weathering on the metal head; handle appears rough and natural but not damaged
